rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EUGENIO S. AMADOR
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/29/2023, as the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 09/26/2023) remain unaddressed: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. The caption must begin with "Order for Final Distribution". LRSF 14.35(I)(6)(b). 2) All the information required by CRC 7.250(a) must be provided as to the sale of the estate real property. 3) An allegation must be made as to whether there are outstanding bills due to any third party for preparing this account. LRSF 14.35(I)(6)(a)(iii). 4) No DE-174 form is on file in response to the creditor claim on file. If the claim was withdrawn, please provide a copy. It should be noted that the creditor dismissed the petition, but not the claim. 5) All heirs of the decedent's predeceased spouse who would take 50% of the estate real property under Probate Code section 6402.5(a)(1)-(3) must be identified and receive notice, as the predeceased spouse's interest in the real property passed to the decedent as the surviving joint tenant. See also section 6402.5(f)(3) & (4). A separate petition under section 11700 is generally required before final distribution to determine additional heirs who were not disclosed at the outset of the proceedings. LRSF 14.35(H). 6) A financial account statement verifying the ending cash balance must be filed. LRSF 14.34(D). A declaration re retention of the original statement required by LRSF 14.59(A) must also be filed. 7) The balance of the estate cash on hand exceeds the FDIC limit. A proof that the estate cash is fully insured in observance of the FDIC limit or is otherwise invested in compliance with section 10533(a)(2) must be filed. 8) A specific amount of net cash distributable to each beneficiary as of a date certain (after payment of the attorney's compensation) must be stated. LRSF 14.35(I)(6)(a). 9) Is Elizabeth Amador Manlapaz the same person as Elizabeth Manlapaz Williams? 10) Paragraph 6 of the attorney's declaration states that his hourly rate is $450, but the attorney's compensation for extraordinary services appears to have been calculated at the $350/hour rate. 11) Please provide supporting time records for the attorney's ordinary services. 12) Please describe the circumstances surrounding the execution of the assignment made by each beneficiary, together with facts supporting no involvement of duress, fraud, or undue influence. See section 11604(b) & (c).

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SU HWA WAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BRIAN WISHNEFSKY
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/5/2023. The following issues to be cleared two weeks prior: (1) Notice of hearing to all persons who are entitled. Prob. Code. sections 11000, 11601. (2) Proposed distribution to include interest on pecuniary gift not made within one year after the testator's death. Prob. Code sec. 12003. A verified supplement to be filed. (3) Proposed order to be revised accordingly. (4) Need an authority under which the court can grant distribution of assets that have not been reported as the estate asset. Music, photos, Facebook content are not reported on I&A. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SERGIO RICCETTI SCHUBERT
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following issues to be cleared: 1. Need to identify a parent of each cousin 2. Need to identify Patrizia Riceeetti's relationship to the decedent. If Patrizia is a cousin, a parent of Patrizia to be identified. 3. Need allegation if the immediate issues in relation to the real properties can be resolved by having a successor trustee of the parents' trust or having a Special Administrator pending complete heir search. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
